title: DISC Craft
description: Modpack for people who have toaster computer, but want to play modded minecraft
body:
Have you ever wonder to play minecraft newest version and have a mod?

Disc Craft is here for You!



A simple modpack that not change the original minecraft mechanic much, While making the game smoothly,

With few new item, New World Generation, New biome, New Structure

That will made your minecraft gameplay more interestinmg
